name: Bob Hope
blurb: He is credited with helping invent the topical monologue that became a late-night staple, and he hosted the Academy Awards ceremony a record 19 times while becoming famous for decades of USO tours entertaining American.
bio: Bob Hope was a British-born American comedian and entertainer whose career spanned nearly 80 years across vaudeville, radio, film, and television. He is credited with helping invent the topical monologue that became a late-night staple, and he hosted the Academy Awards ceremony a record 19 times while becoming famous for decades of USO tours entertaining American troops.

timeline.ev: The Pepsodent Show Starring Bob Hope begins on radio
Begins the Road to... film series with Bing Crosby
Performs his first USO show for American troops
Awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom for USO service
Dies in Los Angeles at age 100

accolades: Hosted the Academy Awards a record 19 times
